Black can play 4...fxe4, forcing the white knight move. Also to be considered is 4...Nc6 controlling the d4 and e5 squares. ==Theory table== {{ChessTable}} '''1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 d6 3.d4 f5 4.dxe5'''
